projects.title: Forecasting Retail Demand Using Time Series Models
projects.summary: Inventory swings between stockouts and overstock have made the client's planning team question its current forecasting approach. ## Objective Develop a data-grounded recommendation the client can act on within one operating cycle, using the frameworks and tools covered in Business Statistics. ## Scope & Approach 1. Assemble and clean historical demand data 2. Compare forecasting models (moving average, exponential smoothing, ARIMA) 3. Validate forecast accuracy against a held-out period 4. Recommend a model and a review cadence ## Deliverables - Final written report (10-12 pages, excluding

projects.title: Attrition Root-Cause Study for a Manufacturing Client
projects.summary: Voluntary attrition has crept up over three consecutive quarters, and leadership wants a data-backed explanation before the next review cycle. ## Objective Develop a data-grounded recommendation the client can act on within one operating cycle, using the frameworks and tools covered in HR Analytics. ## Scope & Approach 1. Combine HRIS, survey, and exit-interview data 2. Test candidate drivers of attrition statistically 3. Rank drivers by impact and actionability 4. Propose targeted retention interventions ## Deliverables - Final written report (10-12 pages, excluding annexures) - 15-minute
